build.buildCommand: composer install --no-dev --optimize-autoloader && php artisan optimize && npm install && npm run build

deploy.startCommand: cp .env.example .env 2>/dev/null; php artisan key:generate --force 2>/dev/null; php artisan storage:link --force 2>/dev/null; php artisan migrate --force 2>/dev/null; php artisan serve --host=0.0.0.0 --port=$PORT
